Other open refs in this cluster are separate docs, Telegram, CLI, or diagnostics work and should not be closed or merged here.

actions.reason: Keep the issue open as the canonical bug until the repaired #92902 path passes proof and lands.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair PR #92902 so replacement channel plugins that declare preferOver keep ownership of active channel config schemas deterministically and the Real behavior proof for #92884 passes.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(config): repair replacement channel schema ownership
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair #92902 so replacement channel plugins that declare `preferOver` keep ownership of active channel config schemas deterministically.
- Preserve @YonganZhang's intended fix for #92884 while keeping the patch focused on config metadata and regression coverage.
- Address the failing Real behavior proof without broad config/schema rewrites.

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/92884
Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/92902 by @YonganZhang

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/validation.channel-metadata.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/validation.channel-metadata.test.ts src/plugins/channel-plugin-ids.test.ts src/cli/config-cli.test.ts src/config/runtime-schema.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm check:changed`
- rerun Real behavior proof for #92902
- `/review`
credit_notes: Repair existing contributor PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/92902 by @YonganZhang; preserve attribution in the PR body and merge notes.
Credit the original reporter in issue https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/92884 when closing after a landed fix.
Do not replace the branch unless maintainer_can_modify changes or the repair grows beyond the narrow config metadata/test surface.
